attributes.description: Alerts when total open connections exceed 1000. High connection count can exhaust FDs and workers.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] High open connections

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik high open connections

### What fired
Total `traefik_open_connections > 1000` during the window.

### Why it matters
Connection counts that grow steadily beyond expected baseline usually mean slow backends or missing keep-alive tuning.

### Triage
1. Check backend latency.

### Remediation
- Tune idle timeouts.

### Tuning
- 1000 threshold; tune per capacity.
